# The Gambia Malaria Budgeting Tool

This folder contains the static files deployed to GitHub Pages.

Hosted app:

<https://path-global-health.github.io/gmb-malaria-budget-app/>

The hosted app uses AWS Cognito sign-in and AWS-backed shared storage. For full setup and handover documentation, see:

`technical-management/hosting-and-aws-walkthrough.md`

For the main repository overview, see the root `README.md`.
